name: 3D Flip Card
description: Card that flips between front and back faces with spring-physics rotation, supporting hover or click triggers and horizontal/vertical directions.
accessibility_notes: back face content is in DOM but visually hidden — ensure aria-hidden toggles with flip state
click trigger is more accessible than hover

className.description: CSS class for the card wrapper

conflicts: backface-visibility may not work in some older browsers
hover trigger not usable on touch devices
